description.unified: Deals Physical DMG to enemies within range 2 times. The first hit knocks enemies down for [1.8 sec->1.5sec]. This skill applies Defense Penetration [800 (added)] higher.
For 8 sec, increases the ATK of all allies by Attack Speed by [36%->10%], and Physical DEF.

Charges forward and deals Physical DMG to nearby enemies 12 times. While casting, the caster is immune to status effects. The final hit freezes enemies for [2.4 sec->2sec] and increases Physical DMG taken by [16% (added)] for [10sec (added)].
Every 1 sec, increases ATK by Status Resistance by [30->10], and damage dealt to non-hero enemies by [1.5%->1%]. This effect stacks up to [20->30] times.

IV.unified: Status Resistance increases by [30->10] for each stack.

light.unified: Cooldown is reduced by [2 sec->3 sec].

description.unified: [Smash] reduces the target's ATK by 25% and increases the P.DMG they take by {0}% for 10 sec.
[Battle Roar] Reduces Mana Cost by 1 and increases targets Crit DMG by {0}% for the duration of Skill.
[Vortex] increases DMG by [{0}% (added)], and its last hit increases the P.DMG the target takes by [{1}% (added)] for 10 Sec.
[Enrage] Changes the max number of stacks to [30->40] and upon gaining 30 stacks, increases own DEF Penetration by {0}.

dark.unified: Recovers HP every second equal to 10% of ATK, and for every 1% HP lost, all damage taken is reduced by [0.6%->0.5%].

description.unified: Max HP increases by {0}%, and Normal Attacks have a 15% chance to deal additional Physical Damage equal to {1}% of Attack Power and freeze the target for [2 sec->1 sec].
